attributes.description: Draws the tab in an active state.
attributes.name: active

attributes.description: Makes the tab closable and shows a close button.
attributes.name: closable

attributes.description: Disables the tab and prevents selection.
attributes.name: disabled

attributes.description: The name of the tab panel this tab is associated with. The panel must be located in the same tab group.
attributes.name: panel

events.description: Emitted when the tab is closable and the close button is activated.
events.name: syn-close

properties.description: Draws the tab in an active state.
properties.name: active

properties.description: Makes the tab closable and shows a close button.
properties.name: closable

properties.description: Disables the tab and prevents selection.
properties.name: disabled

properties.description: The name of the tab panel this tab is associated with. The panel must be located in the same tab group.
properties.name: panel

summary: Tabs are used inside [tab groups](/components/tab-group) to represent and activate [tab panels](/components/tab-panel).
